author: jvranek
content:
hey everyone posting this to try to consolidate what’s been discussed in different threads / venues. There’s discussion that devnet 8 will try to include the builder api. Related to it are changes to the beacon api and what followed from discussion is a need for the keymanager api to manage the different configs. So altogether that’s three PRs to try to review this week so implementation can start next week to make it for devnet 8. 

Note that there’s a lot of bikeshedding around what constitues “too many” config options for a node operator so in these PRs I opted for maximum expressibility so node operators have the option to choose what they do or don’t want to use *later* rather than delay client implementations now.

Reference PRs:
- [KeyManager API #87](https://github.com/ethereum/keymanager-APIs/pull/87) 
- [Beacon API #630](https://github.com/ethereum/beacon-APIs/pull/630/)
- [Builder API #165](https://github.com/ethereum/builder-specs/pull/165)
